PropertyValue: ISNULL(Loc,{''}) + '|' + STR(ISNULL(QtyOnHand,0), 19, 8) + '|' + STR(ISNULL(QtyRsvd,0), 19, 8) + '|' + ISNULL(ItmUM,{''})
AvailToRent

(CASE when exists (select 1 from dbo.invparms as prm where prm.cost_item_at_whse = 0) 
THEN
  ItmCurUCost
ELSE
WhsCurUCost
END)
(CASE WHEN RentalInventory = 1 THEN QtyOnHand ELSE 0 END)

(Select sum(unt.Hold_flag) from fs_unit unt 
join ers_unit eunt on unt.item=eunt.item and unt.ser_num=eunt.ser_num
join  ERS_itemloc ersloc ON unt.item=ersloc.item and unt.whse= ersloc.whse and eunt.Loc = ersloc.loc
where unt.item=Item  and unt.whse=Whse and ersloc.RentalInventory=1)

(Select SUM(loc.qty_on_hand) from itemloc loc left join ers_itemloc ersloc on loc.item=ersloc.item and loc.whse=ersloc.whse and loc.loc=ersloc.loc  where loc.whse=Whse and loc.item=Item and loc.mrb_flag=1 and ersloc.RentalInventory=1)
DerItemRentalStock - DerItemTotalQtyOnRent

(Select SUM(ersloc.QtyOnRent) from itemloc loc left join ers_itemloc ersloc on loc.item=ersloc.item and loc.whse=ersloc.whse and loc.loc=ersloc.loc  where loc.whse=Whse and loc.item=Item AND ERSLOC.RentalInventory=1 AND loc.mrb_flag=1 )
ISNULL(QtyOnHand, 0) - ISNULL(QtyRsvd, 0) - ISNULL(QtyContained, 0)

(CASE when LotLocLot IS NULL
THEN
  QtyOnHand
ELSE
  LotLocQtyOnHand
END)

(Select Sum(unt.Hold_flag) from fs_unit unt
inner join ers_unit eunt on unt.item=eunt.item and unt.ser_num=eunt.ser_num where unt.item=Item  and unt.whse=Whse  and eunt.loc=Loc)
CASE WHEN ItmLotTracked = 1 THEN LotLocQtyOnHand - LotLocQtyRsvd ELSE QtyOnHand - QtyRsvd END
QtyOnRent
dbo.FixMaskForCrystal(QtyUnitFormat, dbo.GetWinRegDecGroup() )

(Select (Sum(cntln.qty)-1) from fs_cont_line cntln 
inner join fs_contract cnt on cntln.contract=cnt.contract
inner join ERS_fs_contract erscnt on cntln.contract=erscnt.Contract
inner join ers_fs_cont_line erscntln on cntln.contract=  erscntln.contract and cntln.cont_line=  erscntln.cont_line
where  cnt.cont_stat<>'CLOSED' 
and  ERScntln.CheckOutDate is null
and cntln.item=Item
and erscnt.status <> 'E')

(Select sum(unt.Hold_flag) from fs_unit unt 
join ers_unit eunt on unt.item=eunt.item and unt.ser_num=eunt.ser_num
join  ERS_itemloc ersloc ON unt.item=ersloc.item and unt.whse= ersloc.whse and eunt.Loc = ersloc.loc
where unt.item=Item  and ersloc.RentalInventory=1)
DerIWhseQtyOnHand

(Select SUM(loc.qty_on_hand) from itemloc loc left join ers_itemloc ersloc on loc.item=ersloc.item and loc.whse=ersloc.whse and loc.loc=ersloc.loc  where  loc.item=Item and loc.mrb_flag=1 and ersloc.RentalInventory=1)

(Select SUM(ersloc.QtyOnRent) from itemloc loc left join ers_itemloc ersloc on loc.item=ersloc.item and loc.whse=ersloc.whse and loc.loc=ersloc.loc  where  loc.item=Item and loc.mrb_flag=1 and ersloc.RentalInventory=1)
(MatlCost+LbrCost+FovhdCost+VovhdCost+OutCost)*QtyOnHand
